about.quote: WE come to YOU. Book with us today and support local business serving the GTA.
about.body: Valko's Mobile Detailing is a student-run mobile car detailing service based in Scarborough, serving the Greater Toronto Area. Every booking shows up with upgraded products and the same standard whether it's a daily driver or a work truck.

faq.q: Does pricing vary by vehicle size?
faq.a: Yes. Listed prices are starting prices and reflect a standard sedan in average condition. Larger vehicles (SUVs, trucks, vans) and heavily soiled interiors will be quoted up front before any work begins — no surprises.

faq.q: What do you need from me on-site?
faq.a: Ideally access to an outdoor water tap and a standard power outlet. If neither is available, DM us — we can arrange a waterless or water-supplied option for an extra fee.

faq.q: What if it rains on the day of my booking?
faq.a: We'll reach out to reschedule at no charge. Interior-only services can usually still go ahead under cover.

faq.q: Do you offer ceramic coating or headlight restoration?
faq.a: DM to inquire — we can refer or schedule depending on the job. Not on the standard menu yet.
E-transfer or cash on the spot after you've inspected the finished work.

contactSection.headline: Ready to book?
contactSection.body: Send the booking details and we'll follow up with timing, pricing, and next steps.
contactSection.formNote: Prefer Instagram? You can still DM us for the fastest back-and-forth.

footer.credit: Built with care for a local business.
